name: 3dmodelboard
description: Static 3D model board (VRM/PMX/PMD). Vendor bundle build only — runtime is pure static HTML.

scripts.build:vendor: npm run clean:vendor && esbuild build/core-entry.js build/loaders-entry.js build/mmd-entry.js build/fflate-entry.js --bundle --format=esm --splitting --outdir=vendor --target=es2022 --minify
scripts.build:vendor:dev: npm run clean:vendor && esbuild build/core-entry.js build/loaders-entry.js build/mmd-entry.js build/fflate-entry.js --bundle --format=esm --splitting --outdir=vendor --target=es2022 --sourcemap
